rationale.R1.6: The passage is dominated by run-on compound sentences, making it hard to parse and obscure which steps depend on which.
rationale.RX.1: Uncertainty disclosure is not explicitly mentioned in the text; instead, it focuses on factual accuracy and clinical utility.
rationale.RX.3: Scope adherence is partially addressed, but the passage does not clearly state what was covered exactly.
rationale.RX.4: Downstream-harm avoidance is not discussed at all; the focus is on factual accuracy and clinical utility.
rationale.RX.5: Provenance and traceability are mentioned briefly, but the details of the calibration task and rater competence are unclear.
